'''âsh-th-d-s''' ('''kashathdesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fill|fill]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-th-d-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fill|fill]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-th-d-s
|-
! Lemma
| kashathdesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishathdesoko|thishathdesoko]] || [[word:jishathdesoko|jishathdesoko]] || [[word:shishathdesoko|shishathdesoko]] || [[word:kishathdesoko|kishathdesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushathdesoko|thuthushathdesoko]] || [[word:jujushathdesoko|jujushathdesoko]] || [[word:shushushathdesoko|shushushathdesoko]] || [[word:kukushathdesoko|kukushathdesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushathdesoko|thushathdesoko]] || [[word:jushathdesoko|jushathdesoko]] || [[word:shushathdesoko|shushathdesoko]] || [[word:kushathdesoko|kushathdesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushathdesoko|thushathdesoko]] || [[word:jushathdesoko|jushathdesoko]] || [[word:shushathdesoko|shushathdesoko]] || [[word:kushathdesoko|kushathdesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshathdesoko|thoshathdesoko]] || [[word:joshathdesoko|joshathdesoko]] || [[word:shoshathdesoko|shoshathdesoko]] || [[word:koshathdesoko|koshathdesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshathdesoko|thĂŠshathdesoko]] || [[word:jĂŠshathdesoko|jĂŠshathdesoko]] || [[word:shĂŠshathdesoko|shĂŠshathdesoko]] || [[word:kĂŠshathdesoko|kĂŠshathdesoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashathdesoko|thashathdesoko]] || [[word:jashathdesoko|jashathdesoko]] || [[word:shashathdesoko|shashathdesoko]] || [[word:kashathdesoko|kashathdesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
